# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    service: 
      id: service_id
    config:
      origins: 
        - "https://example.com"
        - "https://another-example.com"
      methods: 
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "OPTIONS"
      headers: 
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"
        - "X-Requested-With"
      exposed_headers: 
        - "X-Custom-Header"
      max_age: 3600
      allow_credentials: true

  - name: key-auth
    service: 
      id: service_id
    config:
      key_names: 
        - "apikey"
      hide_credentials: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    service: 
      id: service_id
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
      policy: "local"

  - name: cors
    route: 
      id: route_id
    config:
      origins: 
        - "https://example.com"
      methods: 
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
      headers: 
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"

  - name: key-auth
    route: 
      id: route_id
    config:
      key_names: 
        - "apikey"

  - name: rate-limiting
    route: 
      id: route_id
    config:
      second: 10
      minute: 200

  - name: cors
    global: true
    config:
      origins: 
        - "*"
      methods: 
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "OPTIONS"
      headers: 
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"

  - name: key-auth
    global: true
    config:
      key_names: 
        - "apikey"

  - name: rate-limiting
    global: true
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
      policy: "local"
